intro: Aesculus hippocastanum, also known as horse chestnut extract, is a herbal supplement commonly used to relieve symptoms of varicose veins and circulatory disorders. The Aesculus hippocastanum tablet typically contains standardized extracts of the plant's seeds, which contain saponins that help to improve blood vessel function and reduce inflammation. However, it's essential to consult a healthcare professional before taking Aesculus hippocastanum tablets, especially if you have underlying medical conditions or are taking medications.
